notes: Refers to the act of handing something over, such as a document, a project, a building, or a prisoner. Common in professional, military, and everyday contexts.

sentences.german: Die Übergabe der Schlüssel findet morgen statt.
sentences.english: The handover of the keys takes place tomorrow.

sentences.german: Bei der Übergabe des Projekts gab es viele offene Fragen.
sentences.english: During the handover of the project, there were many open questions.
